# MEByteSource

**Class**

Provides read access to the data in a media asset file.

## Declaration

```swift
class MEByteSource
```

## Overview

Media Toolbox passes an `MEByteSource` instance for the media asset’s primary file when it initializes an [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEFormatReader] object. The format reader may call [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource/byteSourceForRelatedFileName(_:)] to request additional byte sources for related files in the same directory as the primary file.

## Inspecting a byte source

- **fileName**: The name of the file for the byte source.
- **fileLength**: The length of the byte source file.
- **contentType**: The format of the byte source file.
- **relatedFileNamesInSameDirectory**: An array of related file names in the parent directory of the byte source file.

## Performing operations on a byte source

- **availableLength(at:)**: Gets the number of available bytes from the offset within the byte source.
- **byteSourceForRelatedFileName(_:)**: Creates a new byte source for a related file.
- **read(length:from:completionHandler:)**: Reads bytes from a byte source into a data object.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
